sub_questions.question_text:
(a) From the top, $K$, of a building $320$ m high, the angles of depression of the top, $L$ and bottom, $M$ of another building on the same horizontal ground are $$29^{\circ}$$ and $$41^{\circ}$$ respectively.
(i) Illustrate the information in a diagram.
(ii) Calculate, correct to the nearest metre, the height of the other building.
(b) The time taken to travel a distance of $120$ km was reduced by $30$ minutes when the speed was increased by $20$ km/h. Calculate the initial speed.

(a) The following statements are true of a certain community.

I: Most businessmen are rich.
C: No salary worker is rich.

(i) Draw a Venn diagram to illustrate the information.
(ii) State whether the following statements are Valid or Not Valid:
$\alpha$) Joe is a businessman and is therefore rich.
$\beta$) Kipo is not rich because he is a salary worker.

(b) The table shows the distribution of heights of seedlings in a nursery.

$$\begin{array}{|l|c|c|c|c|c|}
\hline
\textbf{Heights (cm)} & 60-64 & 65-69 & 70-74 & 75-79 & 80-84 \\ \hline
\textbf{Frequency} & 7 & 6 & 5 & 8 & 4 \\ \hline
\end{array}$$

Calculate, correct to one decimal place, the:
(i) mean;
(ii) variance of the distribution.

(a) Using a scale of $2$ cm to $1$ unit on both axes, draw on a graph sheet two perpendicular axes $Ox$ and $Oy$ for $0 \leq x \leq 8$ and $-6 \leq y \leq 6$.
(i) Plot the points $M(3, 1)$, $N(1, 1)$ and $P(3, 5)$. Join the points to form $\triangle MNP$.
(ii) Draw image triangle $M_1N_1P_1$ which is the reflection of $\triangle MNP$ in the $x$-axis where $M \to M_1$, $N \to N_1$, $P \to P_1$. Indicate clearly the coordinates of $M_1$, $N_1$ and $P_1$.
(iii) Draw the image triangle $M_2N_2P_2$ which is the image of $\triangle MNP$ under the mapping $(x, y) \to \begin{pmatrix}-2 & 0 \\ 0 & -1\end{pmatrix}\begin{pmatrix}x \\ y\end{pmatrix}$, where $M \to M_2$, $N \to N_2$, $P \to P_2$. Indicate clearly the coordinates of $M_2$, $N_2$ and $P_2$.
(b) Find the equation of the line joining the points $M$ and $M_2$.
